title: Flint Tools in Roots Rituals
description: Replaces wooden tools used in Roots Classic rituals with flint tools from No Tree Punching
body:
# Flint Tools in Roots Rituals
Replaces wooden tools used in [Roots Classic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/roots-classic) rituals with flint tools from [No Tree Punching](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/no-tree-punching) to get around the removal of wooden tools.

The recipe for the Engraved Blade is also changed since stone tools are removed as well.

![Living Tool Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fLy62DY3/images/c4cb83f34c80a38b0c3805055527e09353b4ee15.png) ![Life Drain Ritual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fLy62DY3/images/9f4360af773d8763812c27f26f687d600317e668.png) ![Engraved Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fLy62DY3/images/07e247d0c7efcd89736a227d168cc7f7843c156c.png)
